design_philosophy: Sensory, High-end, Authentic. Uses dramatic lighting, earthy olive greens and creams against a deep obsidian background to create a cinematic, premium grocery experience. Inspired by 'Le Marche'.

components_strategy.navbar: Glassmorphism variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 border-b border-[#A3B18A]/20. Links must use Outfit, visible on desktop.
components_strategy.hero_section: Max height 80vh. Use provided hero image with bg-black/50 overlay. Text left-aligned: small uppercase overline, massive H1, and solid olive CTA.
components_strategy.product_card: Cardless design or ultra-subtle 1px border. Image 80% of card, text details (title, price) below. Hover: image scale up 1.05x, parent gets subtle inner shadow.
components_strategy.bento_categories: Asymmetric bento grid for categories (Imported, Organic, Bakery, etc.). Mix col-span-2 and col-span-1.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: bg-[#A3B18A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-medium hover:bg-[#DAD7CD] transition-colors. Secondary: border border-[#A3B18A]/50 text-[#DAD7CD] hover:border-[#A3B18A].
components_strategy.inputs_forms: Shadcn based. bg-[#121411] border-[#A3B18A]/30 focus:border-[#A3B18A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#A3B18A].
components_strategy.footer: Dark background #050505. Massive padding py-32. Huge brand typography at the bottom.
components_strategy.data_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use default Inter or Roboto fonts. Import and use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body.
CRITICAL: Adhere to the provided dark color palette (olive greens, creams, deep blacks). Do not use pure #000000; use #0A0A0A.
CRITICAL: All images must be implemented using the URLs from the media_assets section. Do not use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
CRITICAL: Ensure every interactive button, link, and input has a unique data-testid.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but override the default styles (border-radius, colors) to match the luxury, editorial aesthetic outlined here.
Implement 'Glassmorphism' on the sticky navbar, ensuring text contrast is maintained.
Layouts should breathe. Use p-12 or p-16 paddings. Avoid cramped designs.
No hamburger menus on desktop; show full navigation links.
